rows.label: qev055805_MSG0002
rows.name:
You borrow money, you pay it back!
That's just common sense...
But it seems he has absolutely no intention of paying it back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055805_MSG0003
rows.name:
He blew it all on pizzas...
And he didn't even give Chikochiko a single slice-mo!
Fungo fungo-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055805_MSG0006
rows.name:
Unlike Noborata, Min'boiton seems like he would actually pay back money-mo.
I feel like we could become good friends-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055805_MSG0007
rows.name:
I overheard your conversation-mo!
The caravan folks said they saw Jagged Mortars at Northpointe Cove-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055805_MSG0008
rows.name:
It's a special service-mo! I don't need an information fee,
so hurry up and go get them-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055805_MSG0009
rows.name:
He's not violent like Shirya,
and he's not irresponsible like Noborata...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055805_MSG0010
rows.name:
I feel like I could become very good friends with Min'boiton-mo.
I really want him to come back safely-mo.[ST:wait ]
